user.title: SmartSolar MPPT - Login
user.description:
Enter your SmartSolar credentials

Don't have an account? [Sign up now](https://smartsolar.io.vn/)

mode.title: Select Integration Mode
mode.description:
Choose how to integrate your MPPT charge controller

• device: View data from a single charge controller
• project: Aggregate data from multiple controllers in one place

project_method.title: Select Project Method
project_method.description:
Choose how to set up your project:

• **By Project ID (recommended):**
  - Simple, just one ID
  - Automatically includes all devices in the project

• **By Device ID list:**
  - Enter each device ChipsetID individually
  - Useful when you want specific devices

project_id.title: Enter Project ID
project_id.description:
Enter your Project ID from the SmartSolar management page

**How to find your Project ID:**

Step 1: Log in to SmartSolar
  → Visit: https://smartsolar.io.vn

Step 2: Go to Project management
  → Click "Projects" menu or visit: https://smartsolar.io.vn/Project

Step 3: Create a new Project (if needed)
  → Click "Add New"
  → Enter project name (e.g., "Home")
  → Add devices to the project
  → Save

Step 4: View Project to get the ID
  → Click on the project name in the list
  → Look at the URL in your browser:
     https://smartsolar.io.vn/Monitor/Project?projectId=1072
  → The number after "projectId=" is your Project ID

**Example:**
- URL: smartsolar.io.vn/Monitor/Project?projectId=1072
  → Enter: 1072

project_devices.title: Project Device Configuration
project_devices.description:
Enter your SmartSolar MPPT device IDs

**Instructions:**
- Enter Chipset IDs, separated by commas (,)
- No limit on number of devices

**Examples:**
- 1 device: `547611`
- 2 devices: `547611,14756976`
- 3 devices: `547611,14756976,123456`

error.device_not_found: Device not found with this ChipsetId
error.at_least_one_device_required: At least one device type is required
error.project_not_found: Project not found with this ID
error.no_configuration: No chipset_ids or project_id found in configuration
